---
title: "Comparaison des méthodes de calcul de la taille d’échantillon"
subtitle: "{{< fa brands r-project >}} comme alternative à East et nQuery"
image: "../man/figures/presentation-fr.PNG"
format:
  clean-revealjs:
    title-slide-attributes:
        data-state: "hide-menubar"
    transition: slide
    background-transition: fade
    controls-layout: bottom-right
    menu: true
    section-divs: false
    margin: 0.12
    widescreen: true
    width: 1200
    theme: theme.scss
    incremental: true
    simplemenu:
        barhtml:
          header: 
            "<div class='menubar'>
              <a href='#'>
                <img class='logo' src='../SCC-HexSticker.png' width='70' style='margin:0px 10px'>
              </a>
              <ul class='menu'></ul>
            <div>"
        scale: 0.60
mermaid-format: svg
fig-format: svg
revealjs-plugins:
  - simplemenu
  - fragoff
author:
  - name: Arocena Thomas
    orcid: 0009-0002-7014-220X
    email: arocena.thomas@gmail.com
    role: "Stagiaire"
    affiliations: Oncostat
  - name: Dan Chaltiel
    email: dan.chaltiel@gustaveroussy.fr
    orcid: 0000-0003-3488-779X
    role: "Encadrant"
  - name: Anne Lourdessamy
    email: anne.lourdessamy@gustaveroussy.fr
    orcid: 0009-0006-9051-3302
    role: "Encadrante"
date: last-modified
lang: fr
bibliography: ../references.bibtex
nocite: |
  @*
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
source("presentation-setup.R")
theme_set(theme_clean())
```


<!-- # Introduction {background-color="#202B3E"} -->
# Introduction {data-stack-name="Introduction"}

## Cadre et contexte
- Stage de césure M1 → M2
- 05 Janvier → 13 Mars 
- {{< fa brands r-project >}} source sur [{{< fa brands github >}}-Oncostat](https://github.com/Oncostat/sample-size-comparison)

## Motivations
### Pourquoi utiliser {{< fa brands r-project >}} pour le calcul de la taille d’échantillon ?

- Calcul dans {{< fa brands r-project >}} (pas d’outil externe)
- Partage et reproductibilité via le code
- Pas de problèmes d’export / interopérabilité
- Logiciel libre et open-source (audit, collaboration, {{< fa brands github >}})

::: {.fragment}
→ Nécessité de valider les packages {{< fa brands r-project >}} pour atteindre la crédibilité de logiciels comme East ou nQuery.
:::

## Présentation des logiciels et packages 

::: {.columns}
::: {.column}
- Logiciels :
  * East 6
  * Nquery 9.2
:::
::: {.column}
- Packages {{< fa brands r-project >}}
  * Rpact 4.2.0
  * gsDesign2 1.1.7
  * Rashnu 0.1.2, bbssr 1.0.2, OneArm2stage 1.1.2, SampleSizeSingleArmSurvival
:::
:::
<!-- end columns -->

# Méthodologie {data-stack-name="Méthodologie"}

## Grid Search

Pour chaque design : 

- Fixer plusieurs valeurs par paramètres
- Générer toutes les combinaisons
- Calculer/Extraire la taille d'échantillon N finale

::: {.fragment}
```{r}
tibble(
  "α" = c(0.5, 0.5, 0.1, 0.1),
  "Puissance" = c(0.9, 0.7, 0.9, 0.7),
  "Pertinence" = c("high", "medium", "low", "low"),
  "N East" = c(10, 15, 20, 30),
  "N Rpact" = c(12, 16, 19, 31),
  "N nQuery" = c(8, 12, 15, 25)
) |> 
gt() |> 
data_color(
  columns = Pertinence,
  palette = c(color_high, color_low, color_medium)
) |> 
gt_theme_clean()
```
:::

## Présentation des résultats

N-Ratio = N<sub>Méthode</sub> / N<sub>Référence</sub>

```{r}
resultat_exemple <- 
  tibble(
    alpha = c(0.05, 0.05, 0.2, 0.2, 0.49, 0.49),
    power = c(0.8, 0.60, 0.8, 0.6, 0.8, 0.6),
    n_east = c(10, 15, 20, 30, 60, 100),
    n_rpact = c(10, 16, 19, 31, 58, 100),
    n_nquery = c(10, 12, 15, 25, 51, 89),
  ) |> 
  mutate(relevancy = evaluate_relevancy_bin(alpha, power)) |> 
  mutate(relevancy = fct_relevel(relevancy, c("high", "medium", "low"))) |> 
  get_n_ratio()
```

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="36%"}
::: {.fragment}
```{r}
gt_n_ratio(resultat_exemple, title = "N-Ratio exemple table")
```
:::
:::
::: {.column width="64%"}
::: {.fragment}
```{r}
plot_n_ratio(resultat_exemple, title = "N-Ratio exemple plot")
```
:::
:::
:::
<!-- end columns -->

## Périmètre de la comparaison
### Designs d’essai clinique parcourus

```{mermaid}
---
config:
  theme: neutral
---
flowchart TB
  A["Essai"] --> AB["Binaire"]
    AB --> ABA["2-bras"]
      ABA --> ABAA["Fixe"]
        ABAA --> ABAAA(["Calcul exact"])
        ABAA --> ABAAB(["Test Z-pooled"])
        ABAA --> ABAAC(["Test Z-unpooled"])
      ABA --> ABAB["Group-sequential"]
        ABAB --> ABABA(["Test Z-pooled"])
    AB --> ABB["1-bras"]
      ABB --> ABBA(["Calcul exact"])
      ABB --> ABBB(["Approximation normale"])
  A --> AA["Survie"]
    AA --> AAA["2-bras"]
      AAA --> AAAA(["Fixe"])
      AAA --> AAAB(["Group-sequential"])
    AA --> AAB(["1-bras"])
```


## Périmètre de la comparaison
### Méthodes évaluées selon le type d’essai

::: {style="font-size: 85%;"}
| Endpoint| Type d'essai                  | Évaluation | Logiciel     | Package {{< fa brands r-project >}} |
| :------ | :---------------------------- | :--------- | :----------- | :---------------------------------- |
| Binaire | 2 bras, fixe                  | Pooled     | East, nQuery | Rpact                               |
| Binaire | 2 bras, fixe                  | Exacte     | East, nQuery | bbssr                               |
| Binaire | 2 bras, fixe                  | Unpooled   | East, nQuery | —                                   |
| Binaire | 2 bras, group-sequential      | Pooled     | East         | Rpact                               |
| Binaire | 1 bras, fixe                  | Exacte     | East         | A’Hern (sans package)               |
| Binaire | 1 bras, fixe                  | Approx.norm| East, nQuery | Rpact                               |
| Survie  | 2 bras, fixe                  | —          | East, nQuery | Rpact, Rashnu, gsDesign2            |
| Survie  | 2 bras, group-sequential      | —          | East         | Rpact, gsDesign2                    |
| Survie  | 1 bras, fixe                  | —          | nQuery       | oa2s^[OneArm2stage], sssas^[SampleSizeSingleArmSurvival], Rashnu |
:::

# Endpoint Binaire {data-stack-name="Binaire"}

```{mermaid}
---
config:
  theme: neutral
---
flowchart TB
  AB["Binaire"] --> ABA["2-bras"]
    ABA --> ABAA["Fixe"]
      ABAA --> ABAAA(["Calcul exact"])
      ABAA --> ABAAB(["Test Z-pooled"])
      ABAA --> ABAAC(["Test Z-unpooled"])
    ABA --> ABAB["Group-sequential"]
      ABAB --> ABABA(["Test Z-pooled"])
  AB --> ABB["1-bras"]
    ABB --> ABBA(["Calcul exact"])
    ABB --> ABBB(["Approximation normale"])
```

<!-- ## Quick theorical background
### Required input

Pour calculer le nombre d’événements nécessaire :

- $\alpha$, erreur de type I
- Puissance ($1-\beta$)
- Proportion du groupe contrôle $\pi_c$
- Proportion du groupe expérimental $\pi_e$ -->

## Tests binaires
### Pooled/Unpooled, Fisher exact

::: {style="font-size: 80%;"}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
- Z-test
  - Pooled variance :
    $$
    Z = \frac{\hat{p}_1 - \hat{p}_2}{\sqrt{\hat{p}(1-\hat{p}) \left(\frac{1}{n_1} + \frac{1}{n_2}\right)}}, \quad
    \hat{p} = \frac{x_1 + x_2}{n_1 + n_2}
    $$
  - Unpooled variance :
    $$
    Z = \frac{\hat{p}_1 - \hat{p}_2}{\sqrt{\frac{\hat{p}_1(1-\hat{p}_1)}{n_1} + \frac{\hat{p}_2(1-\hat{p}_2)}{n_2}}}
    $$
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
- Fisher exact test

  - Probabilité exacte des tables 2×2 :
    $$
    P = \frac{\binom{n_1}{x_1}\binom{n_2}{x_2}}{\binom{n_1+n_2}{x_1+x_2}}
    $$
  - Utile pour petits effectifs (pas d'approximation normale)
  - Pas de formule analytique
:::
::::
:::

## Paramètres du Grid Search

| Paramètre                           | Valeurs testées         |
| ------------------------------------| ----------------------- |
| Proportion contrôle $\pi_c$         | 0.1, 0.3, 0.5, 0.8, 0.9 |
| Delta de proportion $\pi_e - \pi_c$ | 0.05, 0.15, 0.25, 0.49  |
| $\alpha$ (2-sided)                  | [0.01]{.bg style="--col: #f0e292ff"}, [0.05]{.bg style="--col: #a7ffc4ff"}, [0.1]{.bg style="--col: #a7ffc4ff"}, [0.20]{.bg style="--col: #f0e292ff"}, [0.49]{.bg style="--col: #ffa194ff"}|
| Puissance (1-$\beta$)               | [0.51]{.bg style="--col: #ffa194ff"}, [0.8]{.bg style="--col: #a7ffc4ff"}, [0.9]{.bg style="--col: #a7ffc4ff"}, [0.99]{.bg style="--col: #ffa194ff"}|

::: {style="font-size: 50%;"}
[pertinent]{.bg style="--col: #a7ffc4ff"}, [peu pertinant]{.bg style="--col: #f0e292ff"}, [cas limite]{.bg style="--col: #ffa194ff"}
:::

<!-- ::: {.fragment}
Pour le GS-Design: 4 analyses
::: -->

## Essai à 2 bras; "fixe"
### Méthodes comparées

::: {style="font-size: 85%;"}
| Endpoint| Type d'essai                  | Évaluation | Logiciel     | Package {{< fa brands r-project >}} |
| :------ | :---------------------------- | :--------- | :----------- | :---------------------------------- |
| Binaire | 2 bras, fixe                  | Pooled     | East, nQuery | Rpact                               |
| Binaire | 2 bras, fixe                  | Exacte     | East, nQuery | bbssr                               |
| Binaire | 2 bras, fixe                  | Unpooled   | East, nQuery | —                                   |
:::

::: {style="font-size: 70%;"}
- East: Difference of Proportions test [PN-2S-DI]
- nQuery : PTT36 / Inequality Tests for Difference of Two Proportions
:::

::: {.fragment}
```{r}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
bbssr::BinarySampleSize()
rpact::getSampleSizeRates()
```
:::

## Essai à 2 bras; "fixe"
### Résultats en pooled-variance

```{r}
#| label: nr_bin_2_fixed_pooled
nr_bin_2_fixed_pooled <- 
  ssc$bin$fixed_pooled$combined |> 
  get_tbl() |> 
  get_n_ratio()
```

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="36%"}
::: {.fragment}
```{r}
#| label: gt_n_ratio(nr_bin_2_fixed_pooled)
#| tbl-widths: 9
gt_n_ratio(
  nr_bin_2_fixed_pooled,
  title = "N-Ratio Binaire à 2-Bras fixe, pooled-variance"
  )
```
::: 
:::
::: {.column width="64%"}
::: {.fragment}
```{r}
#| label: plot_n_ratio(nr_bin_2_fixed_pooled)
#| fig-height: 7.5
plot_n_ratio(
  nr_bin_2_fixed_pooled,
  title = "N-Ratio Binaire à 2-Bras fixe, pooled-variance"
  )
```
:::
:::
::::

## Essai à 2 bras; "fixe"
### Résultats en exact

```{r}
#| label: ref_bin_2_fixed_exact
ref <- "nquery"
ref_name <- "nQuery"
```

```{r}
#| label: nr_bin_2_fixed_exact
ref <- "nquery"
ref_name <- "nQuery"

nr_bin_2_fixed_exact <- 
  ssc$bin$fixed_exact$combined |> 
  get_tbl() |> 
  mutate(relevancy = evaluate_relevancy_bin(alpha, power)) |> 
  mutate(relevancy = fct_relevel(relevancy, c("high", "medium", "low"))) |> 
  get_n_ratio(ref = "nquery")
```

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="36%"}
::: {.fragment}
```{r}
#| label: gt_n_ratio(nr_bin_2_fixed_exact)
gt_n_ratio(
  nr_bin_2_fixed_exact,
  title = "N-Ratio Binaire à 2-Bras fixe, exact",
  ref_name = ref_name
  )
```
::: 
:::
::: {.column width="64%"}
::: {.fragment}
```{r}
#| label: plot_n_ratio(nr_bin_2_fixed_exact)
#| fig-height: 7.5
plot_n_ratio(
  nr_bin_2_fixed_exact,
  title = "N-Ratio Binaire à 2-Bras fixe, exact",
  ref_name = ref_name
  )
```
:::
:::
::::

## Essai à 2 bras; "fixed"
### Résultats en exact II

```{r}
nr_bin_2_fixed_exact_high <- 
  nr_bin_2_fixed_exact |> 
  filter(relevancy == "high")
```

```{r}
p <- ggplot(nr_bin_2_fixed_exact_high) +
  aes(
    x = n_nquery,
    y = n_ratio,
    color = method,
    "α" = alpha,
    "Puissance" = power,
    "πc" = pi_c,
    "delta_π" = delta_pi
    ) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(se = FALSE) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.9, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1.1,  linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    title = "N-Ratio Binaire 2-Bras fixe, exact : Pertinence high",
    subtitle = "Par rapport aux valeurs de nQuery",
    x = "N nQuery",
    y = "N-Ratio",
    color = "Méthodes :"
  ) +
  scale_color_clean() +
  theme_clean() +
  theme(legend.position = NULL)

plotly::ggplotly(p, width = 1100, height = 500)
```

## Essai à 2 bras; GS-Design
### Méthodes comparées

| Endpoint| Type d'essai                  | Évaluation | Logiciel     | Package {{< fa brands r-project >}} |
| :------ | :---------------------------- | :--------- | :----------- | :---------------------------------- |
| Binaire | 2 bras, séquentiel en groupes | Pooled     | East         | Rpact                               |

::: {style="font-size: 70%;"}
- East: Difference of Proportions test [PN-2S-DI]
:::

::: {.fragment}
```{r}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
rpact::getSampleSizeRates()
```
:::

## Essai à 2 bras; GS-Design
### Résultats

```{r}
#| label: nr_bin_2_gs
nr_bin_2_gs <- 
  ssc$bin$gs$combined |> 
  get_tbl() |> 
  get_n_ratio()
```

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="36%"}
::: {.fragment}
```{r}
#| label: gt_n_ratio(nr_bin_2_gs)
#| tbl-widths: 9
gt_n_ratio(
  nr_bin_2_gs,
  title = "N-Ratio Binaire à 2-Bras GS-Design, pooled-variance"
)
```
:::
:::
::: {.column width="64%"}
::: {.fragment}
```{r}
#| label: plot_n_ratio(nr_bin_2_gs)
#| fig-height: 7.5
plot_n_ratio(
  nr_bin_2_gs,
  title = "N-Ratio Binaire à 2-Bras GS-Design, pooled-variance"
)
```
:::
:::
:::
<!-- end columns -->

## Essai à 1 bras
### Méthodes comparées

::: {style="font-size: 85%;"}
| Endpoint| Type d'essai                  | Évaluation | Logiciel     | Package {{< fa brands r-project >}} |
| :------ | :---------------------------- | :--------- | :----------- | :---------------------------------- |
| Binaire | 1 bras, fixe                  | Approchée  | East, nQuery | Rpact                               |
| Binaire | 1 bras, fixe                  | Exacte     | East         | A’Hern (sans package)               |
:::
::: {style="font-size: 70%;"}

- East : Single Proportion test [PN-1S-SP]
- nQuery : POT0 / Chi Square Test for One Proportion

:::

::: {.fragment}
```{r}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
rpact::getSampleSizeRates(group = 1)
```
:::

##  Essai à 1 bras
### Résultats sous approximation normale

```{r}
#| label: nr_bin_1_approx
nr_bin_1_approx <-
  ssc$bin$one_arm_pooled$combined |> 
  get_tbl() |> 
  get_n_ratio()
```

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="36%"}
::: {.fragment}
```{r}
#| label: gt_n_ratio(nr_bin_1_approx)
#| tbl-widths: 9
gt_n_ratio(
  nr_bin_1_approx,
  title = "N-Ratio Binaire à 1-Bras, approx.norm"
)
```
:::
:::
::: {.column width="64%"}
::: {.fragment}
```{r}
#| label: plot_n_ratio(nr_bin_1_approx)
#| fig-height: 7.5
plot_n_ratio(
  nr_bin_1_approx,
  title = "N-Ratio Binaire à 1-Bras, approx.norm"
)
```
:::
:::
:::
<!-- end columns -->

## Essai à 1 bras
### Résultats en exacte

```{r}
#| label: nr_bin_1_exact
nr_bin_1_exact <-
  ssc$bin$one_arm_exact$combined |> 
  get_tbl() |> 
  get_n_ratio()
```

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="36%"}
```{r}
#| label: gt_n_ratio(nr_bin_1_exact)
#| tbl-widths: 9
gt_n_ratio(
  nr_bin_1_exact,
  title = "N-Ratio Binaire à 1-Bras, exact"
)
```
:::
::: {.column width="64%"}
::: {.fragment}
```{r}
#| label: plot_n_ratio(nr_bin_1_exact)
#| fig-height: 7.5
plot_n_ratio(
  nr_bin_1_exact,
  title = "N-Ratio Binaire à 1-Bras, exact"
)
```
:::
:::
:::
<!-- end columns -->

# Endpoint Survie {data-stack-name="Survie"}

```{mermaid}
---
config:
  theme: neutral
---
flowchart TB
  AA["Survie"] --> AAA["2-bras"]
    AAA --> AAAA(["Fixe"])
    AAA --> AAAB(["Group-sequential"])
  AA --> AAB(["1-bras"])
```

<!-- ## Rappel théorique rapide
### Paramètres requis

* Pour calculer le nombre d’événements :

  * $\alpha$ : erreur de type I
  * Puissance ($1-\beta$)
  * Hazard ratio (HR) : $\lambda_2/\lambda_1$

* Pour calculer la taille d’échantillon :

  * Probabilité de survie du groupe contrôle à un instant $t$
  * Durée d’inclusion (accrual)
  * Durée de suivi
  * Taux de pertes (dropout) -->

## Formule de Schoenfeld

@Schoenfeld_1983

$$
e = \frac{4 (z_{1-\alpha/2} + z_{1-\beta})^2}{(\log(HR))^2}
$$

- $HR$ → 1 ⇒ $e$ ↑
- Puissance ↑ ⇒ $e$ ↑
- $\alpha$ ↓ ⇒ $e$ ↑

* Autres formules : Freedman, Hsieh-Freedman

## De $e$ à $n$ : calcul de la taille d’échantillon
### Passage du nombre d’événements au nombre de patients

- Pour obtenir la taille d’échantillon $n$ :

::: {.fragment}
$$
n = \frac{e}{\text{probabilité d’événement dans l’étude}}
$$
:::

- La probabilité d’événement dépend de :
  - De la probabilité de survie
  - Durée de suivi
  - Durée d’inclusion (accrual)
  - Taux de pertes (dropout)

<!-- * **Méthode de Lakatos** :

  * Approche intégrant l’évolution des événements dans le temps
  * Ajuste (n) en fonction de la distribution du temps de suivi et de l’accrual
  * Permet de mieux gérer les plans séquentiels ou les essais à événements retardés -->

## Paramètres du Grid Search

| Paramètre                           | Valeurs testées         |
| ------------------------------------| ----------------------- |
| Survie contrôle à 3 ans $S_c(3)$    | 0.1, 0.3, 0.6, 0.9      |
| Hazard ratio $HR$                   | [0.1]{.bg style="--col: #ffa194ff"}, [0.5]{.bg style="--col: #f0e292ff"}, [0.7]{.bg style="--col :#a7ffc4ff"}, [0.9]{.bg style="--col: #a7ffc4ff"}, [0.99]{.bg style="--col: #ffa194ff"}|
| $\alpha$ (2-sided)                  | [0.01]{.bg style="--col: #f0e292ff"}, [0.05]{.bg style="--col: #a7ffc4ff"}, [0.1]{.bg style="--col: #a7ffc4ff"}, [0.20]{.bg style="--col: #f0e292ff"}, [0.49]{.bg style="--col: #ffa194ff"}|
| Puissance (1-$\beta$)               | [0.51]{.bg style="--col: #ffa194ff"}, [0.8]{.bg style="--col: #a7ffc4ff"}, [0.9]{.bg style="--col: #a7ffc4ff"}, [0.99]{.bg style="--col: #ffa194ff"}|

::: {style="font-size: 50%;"}
[pertinent]{.bg style="--col: #a7ffc4ff"}, [peu pertinant]{.bg style="--col: #f0e292ff"}, [cas limite]{.bg style="--col: #ffa194ff"}
:::

::: {style="font-size: 80%;"}
::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="40%"}
- Période de recrutement de 3 ans  
- Suivi de 3 ans après le dernier admis   
- Proportion égale entre bras contrôle/expérimental
:::
::: {.column width="60%"}
::: {.fragment}
```{r}
#| fig-height: 4
ggplot()+
geom_segment(aes(x = 0, y = 0, xend = 3, yend = 2))+
geom_segment(aes(x = 3, y = 2, xend = 6, yend = 2))+
annotate("text", x = 1.5, y = 0, label = "Recrutement = 3") +
annotate("text", x = 4.5, y = 0, label = "Suivi minimum = 3") +
geom_segment(aes(x = 3, y = 0, xend = 3, yend = 2), linetype = "dashed")+
annotate("text", x = 3, y = -0.1, label = "Durée de l'étude = 6") +
geom_point(aes(x = 6, y = 2))+
labs(x = "Temps en année", y = "Nombre de patients") +
scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(0, 3, 6),
    minor_breaks = 0:6,
  )  +
scale_y_continuous(
  breaks = NULL,
  minor_breaks = NULL,
  expand = c(0, 0.1)
) +
theme_classic()
```
:::
:::
::::
:::

## Essai à 2-Bras; "fixe"
### Methods compared

| Endpoint| Type d'essai                  | Évaluation | Logiciel     | Package {{< fa brands r-project >}} |
| :------ | :---------------------------- | :--------- | :----------- | :---------------------------------- |
| Survie  | 2 bras, fixe                  | —          | East, nQuery | Rpact, Rashnu, gsDesign2            |


::: {style="font-size: 70%;"}
- East: Log Rank Test Given Accrual Duration and Study Duration [SU-2S-LRSD]
- nQuery : STT1 / Two Sample Log-Rank Test of Exponential Survival
:::

::: {.fragment}
```{r}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
rpact::getSampleSizeSurvival()
rashnu::lakatosSampleSize()
gsDesign2::fixed_design_ahr() # needs to define enroll_rate, fail_rate before
```
:::

::: {.fragment}
@Lakatos_1988
:::

## Essai à 2-Bras; "fixe"
### Résultats

```{r}
#| label: nr_surv_2_fixed
nr_surv_2_fixed <- 
  ssc$surv$fixed$combined |> 
  get_tbl() |> 
  get_n_ratio()
```

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="36%"}
::: {.fragment}
```{r}
#| label: gt_n_ratio(nr_surv_2_fixed)
#| tbl-widths: 9
gt_n_ratio(
  nr_surv_2_fixed,
  title = "N-Ratio Survie à 2-Bras fixe"
)
```
:::
:::
::: {.column width="64%"}
::: {.fragment}
```{r}
#| label: plot_n_ratio(nr_surv_2_fixed)_bis
#| fig-height: 7.5
plot_n_ratio(
  nr_surv_2_fixed,
  title = "N-Ratio Survie à 2-Bras fixe"
)
```
:::
:::
:::
<!-- end columns -->

## Essai à 2-Bras; GS-Design
### Méthodes comparées

| Endpoint| Type d'essai                  | Évaluation | Logiciel     | Package {{< fa brands r-project >}} |
| :------ | :---------------------------- | :--------- | :----------- | :---------------------------------- |
| Survie  | 2 bras, séquentiel en groupes | —          | East         | Rpact, gsDesign2                    |


::: {style="font-size: 70%;"}

- East: Log Rank Test Given Accrual Duration and Study Duration [SU-2S-LRSD]

:::

::: {.fragment}
```{r}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
rpact::getSampleSizeSurvival()
gsDesign2::gs_design_ahr() # needs to define enroll_rate, fail_rate before
```
:::

## Essai à 2-Bras; GS-Design
### Résultats I

```{r}
#| label: nr_surv_2_gs
nr_surv_2_gs <- 
  ssc$surv$gs$combined |> 
  get_tbl() |> 
  get_n_ratio()
```

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="36%"}
::: {.fragment}
```{r}
#| label: gt_n_ratio(nr_surv_2_gs)
#| tbl-widths: 9
gt_n_ratio(
  nr_surv_2_gs,
  title = "N-Ratio Survie à 2-Bras GS-Design"
)
```
:::
:::
::: {.column width="64%"}
::: {.fragment}
```{r}
#| label: plot_n_ratio(nr_surv_2_gs)
#| fig-height: 7.5
plot_n_ratio(
  nr_surv_2_gs,
  title = "N-Ratio Survie à 2-Bras GS-Design"
)
```
:::
:::
:::
<!-- end columns -->

## Essai à 2-Bras; GS-Design
### Résultats II

```{r}
ssc$surv$gs$combined  |>  
get_tbl() |> 
filter(
  alpha == 0.05, 
  power == 0.9, 
  hr == 0.6
) |> 
mutate(
  ratio_rpact = signif(n_rpact/n_east, digit = 3),
  ratio_gsdesign2 = signif(n_gsdesign2/n_east, digit = 3)
) |> 
select(-c(starts_with("e_"), relevancy, alpha, power, hr)) |> 
rename(
  "Survie à 3 ans" := surv_t,
  "Rpact" := n_rpact,
  "East" := n_east,
  "gsDesign2" := n_gsdesign2,
  "Rpact/East" := ratio_rpact,
  "gsDesign2/East" := ratio_gsdesign2
) |> 
gt() |> 
tab_header(
    title = "Sample Size dans des cas pertinents",
    subtitle = "α = 0.05, β = 0.1 et HR = 0.6"
) |> 
tab_spanner(
    label = "Sample Size",
    columns = c("Rpact", "East", "gsDesign2")
) |> 
tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#c1dae2ff")
    ),
    location = cells_body(
      columns = c("Rpact", "East", "gsDesign2")
    )
) |> 
tab_spanner(
    label = "Ratio",
    columns = c("Rpact/East", "gsDesign2/East")
) |> 
tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#c8e2c1ff")
    ),
    location = cells_body(
      columns = c("Rpact/East", "gsDesign2/East")
    )
  ) |> 
gt_theme_clean()
```

## Essai à 1-Bras
### Méthodes comparées

| Endpoint| Type d'essai                  | Évaluation | Logiciel     | Package {{< fa brands r-project >}} |
| :------ | :---------------------------- | :--------- | :----------- | :---------------------------------- |
| Survie  | 1 bras, fixe                  | —          | nQuery       | oa2s^[OneArm2stage], sssas^[SampleSizeSingleArmSurvival], Rashnu|

::: {style="font-size: 70%;"}
- nQuery : SOT1 / One Sample Log-Rank Test with Accrual
:::
::: {.fragment}
```{r}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
OneArm2stage::phase2.TTE() # Version with accrual time
SampleSizeSingleArmSurvival::calcSampleSizeArcsine()
rashnu::oneSurvSampleSize()
```
:::

::: {.fragment}
@Nagashima_Noma_Sato_Gosho_2020
:::

## Essai à 1-Bras
### Résultats

```{r}
ref = "nquery"
ref_name = "nQuery"
```

```{r}
#| label: nr_surv_1
nr_surv_1 <- 
  ssc$surv$one_arm$combined |> 
  get_tbl() |> 
  filter(n_nquery < 200000) |> # Above 200 000 nQuery seems to plateau
  get_n_ratio(ref = ref)
```

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="36%"}
::: {.fragment}
```{r}
#| label: gt_n_ratio(nr_surv_1)
#| tbl-widths: 9
gt_n_ratio(
  nr_surv_1,
  title = "N-Ratio Survie à 1-Bras fixe",
  ref_name = ref_name
)
```
:::
:::
::: {.column width="64%"}
::: {.fragment}
```{r}
#| label: plot_n_ratio(nr_surv_1)
#| fig-height: 7.5
plot_n_ratio(
  nr_surv_1,
  title = "N-Ratio Survie à 1-Bras fixe",
  ref_name = ref_name
)
```
:::
:::
:::

```{r}
#| eval: false
dt_one_arm <-
  surv_one_arm |> 
  rename(
    oa2s = n_oa2s,
    sssas = n_sssas,
    rashnu = n_rashnu,
    nquery = n_nquery
  ) |> 
  filter(
    alpha == 0.05,
    power == 0.9,
    hr == 0.7
  ) |> 
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c("oa2s", "sssas", "rashnu", "nquery"),
    names_to = "method",
    values_to = "N"
  )

ggplot(dt_one_arm) +
aes(x = as.factor(surv_t), y = N, color = method) +
geom_point() +
labs(
  title = "Sample Size en fonction de la survie à 3 ans",
  subtitle = "α = 0.05, β = 0.1 et HR = 0.6",
  x = "Survie à 3 ans",
  y = "Sample Size"
) +
theme_minimal()
```

# Conclusion {data-stack-name="Conclusion"}

> {{< fa brands r-project >}} comme alternative à East et nQuery ?

## Synthèse des résultats

::: {style="font-size: 85%;"}
| Endpoint| Type d'essai                  | Évaluation | Correspondance {{< fa brands r-project >}}/Logiciel|
| :------ | :---------------------------- | :--------- | :---------------- | 
| Binaire | 2 bras, fixe                  | Exacte     | 🟡 Modérée       |
| Binaire | 2 bras, fixe                  | Pooled     | 🟢 Élevée        |
| Binaire | 2 bras, group-sequential      | Pooled     | 🟢 Élevée        |
| Binaire | 1 bras, fixe                  | Exacte     | 🟡 Modérée       |
| Binaire | 1 bras, fixe                  | Approx.norm| 🟢 Élevée        |
| Survie  | 2 bras, fixe                  | —          | 🟢 Élevée        |
| Survie  | 2 bras, group-sequential      | —          | 🟡 Modérée       |
| Survie  | 1 bras, fixe                  | —          | 🔵 Faible        |
:::
- {{< fa brands r-project >}} est une alternative vérifiée dans la majorité des cas 

## Limitations

- Vérification partielle
- Choix arbitaires : design, pertinence
- 2381 Designs + extraction → source d'erreurs
- Necessiterait de comparer à chaque MAJ/version
- Absence de consensus = Absence de conclusion

## References
::: {style="font-size: 70%;"}
::: {#refs}
:::
:::

## Merci pour votre attention {.center style="text-align: center;"}
```{r}
# qrcode::qr_code("https://oncostat.github.io/sample-size-comparison/", ecl = "H") |> 
# qrcode::add_logo("SCC-HexSticker.png", ecl = "L") |> 
# generate_svg(filename = "man/figures/qr.svg")
```

::: {.fragment}
![](..\man\figures\qr.svg){width=50%}
:::

# Annexe {data-stack-name="Annexe"}

## {.smaller .scrollable}
@Lakatos_Lan_1992

```{r}
low_cols  <- c("n_rpact","n_rashnu","n_gsdesign2","n_east","n_nquery")
high_cols <- c("n_L","n_F","n_RGS")

ssc$surv$fixed$combined_lnl |>
get_tbl() |> 
select(-c(follow_up_time, starts_with("Power"))) |> 
gt(groupname_col = c("surv_t", "hr", "accrual_time"), row_group_as_column = TRUE ) |> 
tab_header(
    title = "Comparaison avec l'article de Lakatos & Lan",
    subtitle = "Durée de l'étude = 10 ans, α = 0.05, β = 0.1"
) |> 
tab_stubhead(label = "Sc(10) - HR - Accrual") |>
tab_style(
  style = cell_fill(color = "#75cec6ff"),
  location = cells_body(columns = all_of(low_cols))
) |>
tab_style(
  style = cell_fill(color = "#ce9d75ff"),
  location = cells_body(columns = all_of(high_cols))
) |> 
gt_theme_clean() 
```

## {.smaller .scrollable}

::: {.panel-tabset}
### Binaire-2-Bras-Fixed-Pooled

```{r}
nr_bin_2_fixed_pooled_shared <- 
  nr_bin_2_fixed_pooled |> 
  mutate(across(c("alpha", "power", "pi_c", "delta_pi"), as_factor)) |> 
  SharedData$new()
```

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="10%"}
::: {style="font-size: 80%;"}
```{r}
filter_checkbox("relevancy", "Pertinence :", nr_bin_2_fixed_pooled_shared, ~ relevancy)
filter_checkbox("alpha", "α :", nr_bin_2_fixed_pooled_shared, ~ alpha)
filter_checkbox("power", "Puissance :", nr_bin_2_fixed_pooled_shared, ~ power)
filter_checkbox("hr", "Proportion contrôle :", nr_bin_2_fixed_pooled_shared, ~ pi_c)
filter_checkbox("surv_t", "Delta-proportion :", nr_bin_2_fixed_pooled_shared, ~ delta_pi)
```
:::
:::
::: {.column width="80%"}

```{r}
#| fig-width: 8
plot_ly(
  nr_bin_2_fixed_pooled_shared,
  width = 900,
  height = 600
) |> 
add_trace(
  x = ~ n_east,
  y = ~ n_ratio,
  color = ~ method,
  type = "scatter",
  mode = "markers",
  text = ~paste(
    " Méthode : ", method,
    "<br> N East : ", n_east,
    "<br> N-Ratio : ", n_ratio,
    "<br> α : ", alpha,
    "<br>Puissance : ", power,
    "<br>Proportion contrôle : ", pi_c,
    "<br>Delta-proportion : ", delta_pi,
    "<br>Pertinence : ", relevancy
  ),
  hovertemplate = paste(
    "%{text}",
    "<extra></extra>"
  )
) |> 
layout(
  shapes = list(
    # Solid line at y = 1
    list(
      type = "line",
      x0 = 0, x1 = 1,
      xref = "paper",   # span full width
      y0 = 1, y1 = 1,
      line = list(color = "black", width = 2)
    ),
    # Dashed line at y = 0.9
    list(
      type = "line",
      x0 = 0, x1 = 1,
      xref = "paper",
      y0 = 0.9, y1 = 0.9,
      line = list(color = "black", width = 1, dash = "dash")
    ),
    # Dashed line at y = 1.1
    list(
      type = "line",
      x0 = 0, x1 = 1,
      xref = "paper",
      y0 = 1.1, y1 = 1.1,
      line = list(color = "black", width = 1, dash = "dash")
    )
  )
)
```

```{r}
datatable(nr_bin_2_fixed_pooled_shared)
```
:::
:::
<!-- end columns -->

### Binaire-2-Bras-Fixed-Exact

```{r}
nr_bin_2_fixed_exact_shared <- 
  nr_bin_2_fixed_exact |> 
  mutate(across(c("alpha", "power", "pi_c", "delta_pi"), as_factor)) |> 
  SharedData$new()
```

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="10%"}
::: {style="font-size: 80%;"}
```{r}
filter_checkbox("relevancy", "Pertinence :", nr_bin_2_fixed_exact_shared, ~ relevancy)
filter_checkbox("alpha", "α :", nr_bin_2_fixed_exact_shared, ~ alpha)
filter_checkbox("power", "Puissance :", nr_bin_2_fixed_exact_shared, ~ power)
filter_checkbox("hr", "Proportion contrôle :", nr_bin_2_fixed_exact_shared, ~ pi_c)
filter_checkbox("surv_t", "Delta-proportion :", nr_bin_2_fixed_exact_shared, ~ delta_pi)
```
:::
:::
::: {.column width="80%"}

```{r}
#| fig-width: 8
plot_ly(
  nr_bin_2_fixed_exact_shared,
  width = 900,
  height = 600
) |> 
add_trace(
  x = ~ n_nquery,
  y = ~ n_ratio,
  color = ~ method,
  type = "scatter",
  mode = "markers",
  text = ~paste(
    " Méthode : ", method,
    "<br> N nQuery : ", n_nquery,
    "<br> N-Ratio : ", n_ratio,
    "<br> α : ", alpha,
    "<br>Puissance : ", power,
    "<br>Proportion contrôle : ", pi_c,
    "<br>Delta-proportion : ", delta_pi,
    "<br>Pertinence : ", relevancy
  ),
  hovertemplate = paste(
    "%{text}",
    "<extra></extra>"
  )
) |> 
layout(
  shapes = list(
    # Solid line at y = 1
    list(
      type = "line",
      x0 = 0, x1 = 1,
      xref = "paper",   # span full width
      y0 = 1, y1 = 1,
      line = list(color = "black", width = 2)
    ),
    # Dashed line at y = 0.9
    list(
      type = "line",
      x0 = 0, x1 = 1,
      xref = "paper",
      y0 = 0.9, y1 = 0.9,
      line = list(color = "black", width = 1, dash = "dash")
    ),
    # Dashed line at y = 1.1
    list(
      type = "line",
      x0 = 0, x1 = 1,
      xref = "paper",
      y0 = 1.1, y1 = 1.1,
      line = list(color = "black", width = 1, dash = "dash")
    )
  )
)
```

```{r}
datatable(nr_bin_2_fixed_exact_shared)
```
:::
:::
<!-- end columns -->

### Binaire-2-Bras-GS

```{r}
nr_bin_2_gs_shared <- 
  nr_bin_2_gs |> 
  mutate(across(c("alpha", "power", "pi_c", "delta_pi"), as_factor)) |> 
  SharedData$new()
```

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="10%"}
::: {style="font-size: 80%;"}
```{r}
filter_checkbox("relevancy", "Pertinence :", nr_bin_2_gs_shared, ~ relevancy)
filter_checkbox("alpha", "α :", nr_bin_2_gs_shared, ~ alpha)
filter_checkbox("power", "Puissance :", nr_bin_2_gs_shared, ~ power)
filter_checkbox("hr", "Proportion contrôle :", nr_bin_2_gs_shared, ~ pi_c)
filter_checkbox("surv_t", "Delta-proportion :", nr_bin_2_gs_shared, ~ delta_pi)
```
:::
:::
::: {.column width="80%"}

```{r}
#| fig-width: 8
plot_ly(
  nr_bin_2_gs_shared,
  width = 900,
  height = 600
) |> 
add_trace(
  x = ~ n_east,
  y = ~ n_ratio,
  color = ~ method,
  type = "scatter",
  mode = "markers",
  text = ~paste(
    " Méthode : ", method,
    "<br> N East : ", n_east,
    "<br> N-Ratio : ", n_ratio,
    "<br> α : ", alpha,
    "<br>Puissance : ", power,
    "<br>Proportion contrôle : ", pi_c,
    "<br>Delta-proportion : ", delta_pi,
    "<br>Pertinence : ", relevancy
  ),
  hovertemplate = paste(
    "%{text}",
    "<extra></extra>"
  )
) |> 
layout(
  shapes = list(
    # Solid line at y = 1
    list(
      type = "line",
      x0 = 0, x1 = 1,
      xref = "paper",   # span full width
      y0 = 1, y1 = 1,
      line = list(color = "black", width = 2)
    ),
    # Dashed line at y = 0.9
    list(
      type = "line",
      x0 = 0, x1 = 1,
      xref = "paper",
      y0 = 0.9, y1 = 0.9,
      line = list(color = "black", width = 1, dash = "dash")
    ),
    # Dashed line at y = 1.1
    list(
      type = "line",
      x0 = 0, x1 = 1,
      xref = "paper",
      y0 = 1.1, y1 = 1.1,
      line = list(color = "black", width = 1, dash = "dash")
    )
  )
)
```

```{r}
datatable(nr_bin_2_gs_shared)
```
:::
:::
<!-- end columns -->

### Binaire-1-Bras-approx

```{r}
nr_bin_1_approx_shared <- 
  nr_bin_1_approx |> 
  mutate(across(c("alpha", "power", "pi_c", "delta_pi"), as_factor)) |> 
  SharedData$new()
```

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="10%"}
::: {style="font-size: 80%;"}
```{r}
filter_checkbox("relevancy", "Pertinence :", nr_bin_1_approx_shared, ~ relevancy)
filter_checkbox("alpha", "α :", nr_bin_1_approx_shared, ~ alpha)
filter_checkbox("power", "Puissance :", nr_bin_1_approx_shared, ~ power)
filter_checkbox("hr", "Proportion contrôle :", nr_bin_1_approx_shared, ~ pi_c)
filter_checkbox("surv_t", "Delta-proportion :", nr_bin_1_approx_shared, ~ delta_pi)
```
:::
:::
::: {.column width="80%"}

```{r}
#| fig-width: 8
plot_ly(
  nr_bin_1_approx_shared,
  width = 900,
  height = 600
) |> 
add_trace(
  x = ~ n_east,
  y = ~ n_ratio,
  color = ~ method,
  type = "scatter",
  mode = "markers",
  text = ~paste(
    " Méthode : ", method,
    "<br> N East : ", n_east,
    "<br> N-Ratio : ", n_ratio,
    "<br> α : ", alpha,
    "<br>Puissance : ", power,
    "<br>Proportion contrôle : ", pi_c,
    "<br>Delta-proportion : ", delta_pi,
    "<br>Pertinence : ", relevancy
  ),
  hovertemplate = paste(
    "%{text}",
    "<extra></extra>"
  )
) |> 
layout(
  shapes = list(
    # Solid line at y = 1
    list(
      type = "line",
      x0 = 0, x1 = 1,
      xref = "paper",   # span full width
      y0 = 1, y1 = 1,
      line = list(color = "black", width = 2)
    ),
    # Dashed line at y = 0.9
    list(
      type = "line",
      x0 = 0, x1 = 1,
      xref = "paper",
      y0 = 0.9, y1 = 0.9,
      line = list(color = "black", width = 1, dash = "dash")
    ),
    # Dashed line at y = 1.1
    list(
      type = "line",
      x0 = 0, x1 = 1,
      xref = "paper",
      y0 = 1.1, y1 = 1.1,
      line = list(color = "black", width = 1, dash = "dash")
    )
  )
)
```

```{r}
datatable(nr_bin_1_approx_shared)
```
:::
:::
<!-- end columns -->

### Binaire-1-Bras-exact

```{r}
nr_bin_1_exact_shared <- 
  nr_bin_1_exact |> 
  mutate(across(c("alpha", "power", "pi_c", "delta_pi"), as_factor)) |> 
  SharedData$new()
```

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="10%"}
::: {style="font-size: 80%;"}
```{r}
filter_checkbox("relevancy", "Pertinence :", nr_bin_1_exact_shared, ~ relevancy)
filter_checkbox("alpha", "α :", nr_bin_1_exact_shared, ~ alpha)
filter_checkbox("power", "Puissance :", nr_bin_1_exact_shared, ~ power)
filter_checkbox("hr", "Proportion contrôle :", nr_bin_1_exact_shared, ~ pi_c)
filter_checkbox("surv_t", "Delta-proportion :", nr_bin_1_exact_shared, ~ delta_pi)
```
:::
:::
::: {.column width="80%"}

```{r}
#| fig-width: 8
plot_ly(
  nr_bin_1_exact_shared,
  width = 900,
  height = 600
) |> 
add_trace(
  x = ~ n_east,
  y = ~ n_ratio,
  color = ~ method,
  type = "scatter",
  mode = "markers",
  text = ~paste(
    " Méthode : ", method,
    "<br> N East : ", n_east,
    "<br> N-Ratio : ", n_ratio,
    "<br> α : ", alpha,
    "<br>Puissance : ", power,
    "<br>Proportion contrôle : ", pi_c,
    "<br>Delta-proportion : ", delta_pi,
    "<br>Pertinence : ", relevancy
  ),
  hovertemplate = paste(
    "%{text}",
    "<extra></extra>"
  )
) |> 
layout(
  shapes = list(
    # Solid line at y = 1
    list(
      type = "line",
      x0 = 0, x1 = 1,
      xref = "paper",   # span full width
      y0 = 1, y1 = 1,
      line = list(color = "black", width = 2)
    ),
    # Dashed line at y = 0.9
    list(
      type = "line",
      x0 = 0, x1 = 1,
      xref = "paper",
      y0 = 0.9, y1 = 0.9,
      line = list(color = "black", width = 1, dash = "dash")
    ),
    # Dashed line at y = 1.1
    list(
      type = "line",
      x0 = 0, x1 = 1,
      xref = "paper",
      y0 = 1.1, y1 = 1.1,
      line = list(color = "black", width = 1, dash = "dash")
    )
  )
)
```

```{r}
datatable(nr_bin_1_exact_shared)
```
:::
:::
<!-- end columns -->

### Survie-2-Bras-Fixed

```{r}
nr_surv_2_fixed_shared <- 
  nr_surv_2_fixed |> 
  mutate(across(c("alpha", "power", "hr", "surv_t"), as_factor)) |> 
  SharedData$new()
```

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="10%"}
::: {style="font-size: 80%;"}
```{r}
filter_checkbox("relevancy", "Pertinence :", nr_surv_2_fixed_shared, ~ relevancy)
filter_checkbox("alpha", "α :", nr_surv_2_fixed_shared, ~ alpha)
filter_checkbox("power", "Puissance :", nr_surv_2_fixed_shared, ~ power)
filter_checkbox("hr", "Hazard ratio :", nr_surv_2_fixed_shared, ~ hr)
filter_checkbox("surv_t", "Survie à 3 ans :", nr_surv_2_fixed_shared, ~ surv_t)
```
:::
:::
::: {.column width="80%"}

```{r}
#| fig-width: 8
plot_ly(
  nr_surv_2_fixed_shared,
  width = 900,
  height = 600
) |> 
add_trace(
  x = ~ n_east,
  y = ~ n_ratio,
  color = ~ method,
  type = "scatter",
  mode = "markers",
  text = ~paste(
    " Méthode : ", method,
    "<br> N East : ", n_east,
    "<br> N-Ratio : ", n_ratio,
    "<br> α : ", alpha,
    "<br>Puissance : ", power,
    "<br>Hazard ratio : ", hr,
    "<br>Survie à 3 ans : ", surv_t,
    "<br>Pertinence : ", relevancy
  ),
  hovertemplate = paste(
    "%{text}",
    "<extra></extra>"
  )
) |> 
layout(
  shapes = list(
    # Solid line at y = 1
    list(
      type = "line",
      x0 = 0, x1 = 1,
      xref = "paper",   # span full width
      y0 = 1, y1 = 1,
      line = list(color = "black", width = 2)
    ),
    # Dashed line at y = 0.9
    list(
      type = "line",
      x0 = 0, x1 = 1,
      xref = "paper",
      y0 = 0.9, y1 = 0.9,
      line = list(color = "black", width = 1, dash = "dash")
    ),
    # Dashed line at y = 1.1
    list(
      type = "line",
      x0 = 0, x1 = 1,
      xref = "paper",
      y0 = 1.1, y1 = 1.1,
      line = list(color = "black", width = 1, dash = "dash")
    )
  )
)
```

```{r}
datatable(nr_surv_2_fixed_shared)
```
:::
:::
<!-- end columns -->

### Survie-2-Bras-GS

```{r}
nr_surv_2_gs_shared <- 
  nr_surv_2_gs |> 
  mutate(across(c("alpha", "power", "hr", "surv_t"), as_factor)) |> 
  SharedData$new()
```

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="10%"}
::: {style="font-size: 80%;"}
```{r}
filter_checkbox("relevancy", "Pertinence :", nr_surv_2_gs_shared, ~ relevancy)
filter_checkbox("alpha", "α :", nr_surv_2_gs_shared, ~ alpha)
filter_checkbox("power", "Puissance :", nr_surv_2_gs_shared, ~ power)
filter_checkbox("hr", "Hazard ratio :", nr_surv_2_gs_shared, ~ hr)
filter_checkbox("surv_t", "Survie à 3 ans :", nr_surv_2_gs_shared, ~ surv_t)
```
:::
:::
::: {.column width="80%"}

```{r}
#| fig-width: 8
plot_ly(
  nr_surv_2_gs_shared,
  width = 900,
  height = 600
) |> 
add_trace(
  x = ~ n_east,
  y = ~ n_ratio,
  color = ~ method,
  type = "scatter",
  mode = "markers",
  text = ~paste(
    " Méthode : ", method,
    "<br> N East : ", n_east,
    "<br> N-Ratio : ", n_ratio,
    "<br> α : ", alpha,
    "<br>Puissance : ", power,
    "<br>Hazard ratio : ", hr,
    "<br>Survie à 3 ans : ", surv_t,
    "<br>Pertinence : ", relevancy
  ),
  hovertemplate = paste(
    "%{text}",
    "<extra></extra>"
  )
) |> 
layout(
  shapes = list(
    # Solid line at y = 1
    list(
      type = "line",
      x0 = 0, x1 = 1,
      xref = "paper",   # span full width
      y0 = 1, y1 = 1,
      line = list(color = "black", width = 2)
    ),
    # Dashed line at y = 0.9
    list(
      type = "line",
      x0 = 0, x1 = 1,
      xref = "paper",
      y0 = 0.9, y1 = 0.9,
      line = list(color = "black", width = 1, dash = "dash")
    ),
    # Dashed line at y = 1.1
    list(
      type = "line",
      x0 = 0, x1 = 1,
      xref = "paper",
      y0 = 1.1, y1 = 1.1,
      line = list(color = "black", width = 1, dash = "dash")
    )
  )
)
```

```{r}
datatable(nr_surv_2_gs_shared)
```
:::
:::
<!-- end columns -->

### Survie-1-Bras

```{r}
nr_surv_1_shared <- 
  nr_surv_1 |> 
  mutate(across(c("alpha", "power", "hr", "surv_t"), as_factor)) |> 
  SharedData$new()
```

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="10%"}
::: {style="font-size: 80%;"}
```{r}
filter_checkbox("relevancy", "Pertinence:", nr_surv_1_shared, ~ relevancy)
filter_checkbox("alpha", "α :", nr_surv_1_shared, ~ alpha)
filter_checkbox("power", "Puissance :", nr_surv_1_shared, ~ power)
filter_checkbox("hr", "Hazard ratio :", nr_surv_1_shared, ~ hr)
filter_checkbox("surv_t", "Survie à 3 ans:", nr_surv_1_shared, ~ surv_t)
```
:::
:::
::: {.column width="80%"}

```{r}
#| fig-width: 8
plot_ly(
  nr_surv_1_shared,
  width = 900,
  height = 600
) |> 
add_trace(
  x = ~ n_nquery,
  y = ~ n_ratio,
  color = ~ method,
  type = "scatter",
  mode = "markers",
  text = ~paste(
    " Méthode : ", method,
    "<br> N nQuery : ", n_nquery,
    "<br> N-Ratio : ", n_ratio,
    "<br> α : ", alpha,
    "<br>Puissance : ", power,
    "<br>Hazard ratio : ", hr,
    "<br>Survie à 3 ans : ", surv_t,
    "<br>Pertinence : ", relevancy
  ),
  hovertemplate = paste(
    "%{text}",
    "<extra></extra>"
  )
) |> 
layout(
  shapes = list(
    # Solid line at y = 1
    list(
      type = "line",
      x0 = 0, x1 = 1,
      xref = "paper",   # span full width
      y0 = 1, y1 = 1,
      line = list(color = "black", width = 2)
    ),
    # Dashed line at y = 0.9
    list(
      type = "line",
      x0 = 0, x1 = 1,
      xref = "paper",
      y0 = 0.9, y1 = 0.9,
      line = list(color = "black", width = 1, dash = "dash")
    ),
    # Dashed line at y = 1.1
    list(
      type = "line",
      x0 = 0, x1 = 1,
      xref = "paper",
      y0 = 1.1, y1 = 1.1,
      line = list(color = "black", width = 1, dash = "dash")
    )
  )
)
```

```{r}
datatable(nr_surv_1_shared)
```
:::
:::
<!-- end columns -->
